    {"idx": 0, "aspects": [{"aspect": "servers_netcode", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "servers are shut down"}]},

    {"idx": 2, "aspects": [{"aspect": "servers_netcode", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "THEY DEADASS TOOK THE SERVERS DOWN AFTER 3 YEARS"}, {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "you are not even able to play mycarrer"}]},

    {"idx": 5, "aspects": []},
    {"idx": 6, "aspects": []},

    {"idx": 8, "aspects": [{"aspect": "relaxation", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Relaxing game"}, {"aspect": "level_design", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "nice map"}, {"aspect": "dlc", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "many dlc's"}, {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Really worth getting"}]},

    {"idx": 0, "aspects": []},

    {"idx": 2, "aspects": [{"aspect": "relaxation", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "stressful game"}, {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "has its good and bad moments"}]},
    {"idx": 3, "aspects": []},
    {"idx": 4, "aspects": [{"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "this game is a addiction it ruins ur sleep once u play youll never wanna go to work /schoool it will ruin ur life"}]},
    {"idx": 5, "aspects": [
        {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The gameplay itself is genuinely brilliant"},
        {"aspect": "progression", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "gutting the progression system"},
        {"aspect": "community", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "The toxicity in lobbies is real"},
        {"aspect": "monetization", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "turning what used to be a thriving community into a cash-grab storefront"},
        {"aspect": "replayability", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "I've sunk hundreds of hours into it and still find myself coming back"}
    ]},
    {"idx": 6, "aspects": []},
    {"idx": 7, "aspects": []},
    {"idx": 8, "aspects": [
        {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "pure magic because nothing compares to the rush of a last second save or the high of a perfect goal"},
        {"aspect": "emotional_impact", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "even the heartbreak of missing an open net is part of the endless joy"}
    ]},
    {"idx": 9, "aspects": []},
    {"idx": 10, "aspects": [{"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Addiction is this game. I have never been the same."}]},
    {"idx": 11, "aspects": [
        {"aspect": "mods", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "having all kinds of mods on this game makes it ten times better"},
        {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Ive spent so much tome playing skylines i love all things city planning"}
    ]},
    {"idx": 12, "aspects": []},
    {"idx": 13, "aspects": [
        {"aspect": "stability", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "constant pop up errors, horrible lag, crashing, freezing"},
        {"aspect": "bugs", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "game outright REFUSING to load maps or turn on/off mods"},
        {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "$32 of cash down the drain"},
        {"aspect": "graphics", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "you'll get a far better city sim game in MS-paint than here"}
    ]},
    {"idx": 14, "aspects": []},
    {"idx": 15, "aspects": [
        {"aspect": "build_variety", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "you can play the game multiple different ways (Merc, Trader, Vassel, Ruler)"},
        {"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The world, for the most part, moves pretty consistently"},
        {"aspect": "combat", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Battles can be fun and do require some thinking"},
        {"aspect": "ai_behavior", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "AI lords and leaders are terrible when it comes to tactics"},
        {"aspect": "writing", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Dialouges are rough and uninteresting"},
        {"aspect": "graphics", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Graphics are very poor"},
        {"aspect": "mods", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "you will absolutely need mods as the base systems and features just aren't there"},
        {"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "There is so much potential in the towns and villages if they were more interactive"},
        {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Buy on discount"}
    ]},
    {"idx": 16, "aspects": []},
    {"idx": 17, "aspects": [
        {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "this game is fun"},
        {"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "addicting"}
    ]},
    {"idx": 18, "aspects": []},
